title: VoidDream
description: VoidDream turns Minecraft deeply unsettling — inverted lighting, color-shifting world and glowing block outlines. Strange enough to feel wrong, balanced enough to play.
body:
VoidDream is a shader pack that makes Minecraft feel deeply wrong — in a good way.
Effects:

Water looks like a living black hole — spiraling UV distortion with pulsing dark crimson veins
The entire world slowly drifts through the color spectrum (~5 min full cycle)
Lighting is inverted — caves are bright, daylight is dim
Distant blocks shift hue, making the horizon feel like it's dissolving
Glowing block outlines via edge detection, color-cycling white → blue → pink
Subtle chromatic aberration and CRT scanlines
Slight fisheye lens warp

Compatibility: OptiFine / Iris Shaders · Minecraft 1.21+
Playable. Strange, but playable.
